text: Aaj khane ki table par papa ne announce kar diya ki hum doosre shehar shift ho rahe hain kyunki bade bhaiyya ko wahan business set karna hai. Maine thoda bolne ki koshish ki toh mummy ne rona shuru kar diya ki meri zidd ki wajah se ghar mein kalesh ho raha hai aur unka BP badh gaya hai. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, bas rona aa raha hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki ab saans kaise loon.

Bina mujhse pooche papa ne decide kiya ki meri nanad ki shadi ke liye meri thodi bahut savings aur gehne use honge. Jab maine objection kiya toh mummy ne taana maara ki 'sab tumhari wajah se ho raha hai' aur unka sar samaj mein neecha ho raha hai. Itni ghabrahat aur dukh ho raha hai ki main kuch soch hi nahi pa rahi, bas kamre mein band hokar sisak rahi hoon.

Papa ne announce kiya ki main ab job dhoondna band karun aur poora dhyan sirf doosre bachhe ki planning par lagau. Mummy ne seene pe haath rakh kar bol diya ki meri career ki zidd unhe shamshaan pahuncha degi aur unka heart kamzor ho gaya hai. Mera gala rone se bhara hua hai, itni zyada flood of emotions hai ki main apne bacchon ka chehra tak theek se nahi dekh pa rahi.

Aaj subah papa ne decide kiya ki ab se saas-bahu ke har jhagde mein faisla sirf wahi lenge aur main koi counter nahi karungi. Mummy keh rahi hain ki 'log kya kahenge' aur meri wajah se hi unka har din dukh mein nikal raha hai. Mujhe itna gussa aur frustration mehsus ho raha hai ki mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas akele baith kar rona aa raha hai.

Bina meri marzi ke papa ne ghar ka renovation shuru karwa diya aur meri personal identity ka jo thoda bahut corner tha wo bhi khatam kar diya. Mummy ne rona-dhona shuru kar diya ki meri wajah se unhe roz papa ki dant sunni padti hai aur unka sukh-chain chheen gaya hai. Main poori tarah se toot gayi hoon, bas rona hi nikal raha hai aur future bilkul andhera lag raha hai.
